Solve the mystery of the Troll's Call in Rocky Beach! As one of the Three Investigators, explore multiple locations, examine objects, collect clues, and interview witnesses. Combine inventory items and solve logical puzzles to uncover the truth behind mysterious troll-related incidents. Progress through the story by completing puzzles and unlocking new locations. The mystery is solved when you gather all clues and identify the culprit.

Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and UI elements | Space: Interact with hotspots, examine objects, advance dialogue | Z: Open/Close inventory | Shift: Combine selected inventory items | Enter: Start game from main menu | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game (return to start screen)
